profileId.description: The ID of the Campaign Manager 360 profile you want to use.
profileId.label: Profile ID

defaultFloodlightActivityId.description: The Default Floodlight activity ID associated with all the mappings. Can be overridden in the mapping.
defaultFloodlightActivityId.label: Default Floodlight Activity ID

defaultFloodlightConfigurationId.description: The Default Floodlight configuration ID associated with all the mappings. Can be overridden in the mapping.
defaultFloodlightConfigurationId.label: Default Floodlight Configuration ID

oauth.description: Authorizes Segment to OAuth to the Destination API
oauth.label: OAuth

access-token.description: The (legacy) access token provided by Destination API after the OAuth handshake.

access_token.description: The access token provided by Destination API after the OAuth handshake.

appId.description: The App ID, retrieved via Destination API post-auth.

appName.description: The authorized user App, retrieved via Destination API on settings view load.

createdBy.description: Email address of segment user who connected OAuth.

displayName.description: The authorized user, retrieved via Destination API on settings view load.

refresh_token.description: The refresh token provided by Destination API after the OAuth handshake.

actions.name: Conversion Adjustment Upload
actions.description: Adjust an conversion in Campaign Manager 360.

fields.label: Required ID
fields.description: A user identifier record the conversion against. Exactly one of Google Click ID, Display Click ID, Encrypted User ID, Mobile Device ID, Match ID, Impression ID or Encrypted User ID Candidates must be provided.

requiredId.title: Required ID
requiredId.description: A user identifier record the conversion against. Exactly one of Google Click ID, Display Click ID, Encrypted User ID, Mobile Device ID, Match ID, Impression ID or Encrypted User ID Candidates must be provided.

gclid.title: Google Click ID
gclid.description: The Google Click ID (gclid) associated with the conversion.

dclid.title: Display Click ID
dclid.description: The Display Click ID (dclid) associated with the conversion.

encryptedUserId.title: Encrypted User ID
encryptedUserId.description: The encrypted user ID associated with the conversion. If this field is set then 'Encryption Entity ID', 'Encryption Entity Type' and 'Encryption Source' should also be specified.

mobileDeviceId.title: Mobile Device ID
mobileDeviceId.description: The mobile device ID associated with the conversion.

matchId.title: Match ID
matchId.description: The match ID field. A match ID is your own first-party identifier that has been synced with Google using the match ID feature in Floodlight.

impressionId.title: Impression ID
impressionId.description: The impression ID associated with the conversion.

fields.label: Floodlight Configuration ID
fields.description: The Floodlight configuration ID associated with the conversion. Overrides the default Floodlight Configuration ID defined in Settings.

floodlightConfigurationId.title: Floodlight Configuration ID
floodlightConfigurationId.description: The Floodlight configuration ID associated with the conversion. Overrides the default Floodlight Configuration ID defined in Settings.

fields.label: Floodlight Activity ID
fields.description: The Floodlight activity ID associated with the conversion. Overrides the default Floodlight Activity ID defined in Settings.

floodlightActivityId.title: Floodlight Activity ID
floodlightActivityId.description: The Floodlight activity ID associated with the conversion. Overrides the default Floodlight Activity ID defined in Settings.

fields.label: Encryption Info
fields.description: The encryption information associated with the conversion. Required if Encrypted User ID or Encryption User ID Candidates fields are populated.

encryptionInfo.title: Encryption Info
encryptionInfo.description: The encryption information associated with the conversion. Required if Encrypted User ID or Encryption User ID Candidates fields are populated.

encryptionEntityId.title: Encryption Entity ID
encryptionEntityId.description: The encryption entity ID. This should match the encryption type configuration for ad serving or Data Transfer.

encryptionEntityType.title: Encryption Entity Type
encryptionEntityType.description: The encryption entity type. This should match the encryption type configuration for ad serving or Data Transfer.

encryptionSource.title: Encryption Source
encryptionSource.description: The encryption source. This should match the encryption type configuration for ad serving or Data Transfer.

fields.label: User Details
fields.description: User details associated with the conversion.

userDetails.title: User Details
userDetails.description: User details associated with the conversion.

email.title: Email
email.description: The user's email address. If unhashed, Segment will hash before sending to Campaign Manager 360.

phone.title: Phone
phone.description: The user's phone number. If unhashed, Segment will hash before sending to Campaign Manager 360.

firstName.title: First Name
firstName.description: First name of the user. If unhashed, Segment will hash before sending to Campaign Manager 360.

lastName.title: Last Name
lastName.description: Last name of the user. If unhashed, Segment will hash before sending to Campaign Manager 360.

streetAddress.title: Street Address
streetAddress.description: The street address of the user. If unhashed, Segment will hash before sending to Campaign Manager 360.

countryCode.title: Country Code
countryCode.description: 2-letter country code in ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 of the user's address.

fields.label: Timestamp (ISO-8601)
fields.description: The timestamp of the conversion in a ISO-8601 string.

timestamp.title: Timestamp (ISO-8601)
timestamp.description: The timestamp of the conversion in a ISO-8601 string.

fields.label: Value
fields.description: The value of the conversion.

fields.label: Quantity
fields.description: The quantity of the conversion.

fields.label: Ordinal
fields.description: The ordinal of the conversion. Use this field to control how conversions of the same user and day are de-duplicated.

ordinal.title: Ordinal
ordinal.description: The ordinal of the conversion. Use this field to control how conversions of the same user and day are de-duplicated.

fields.label: Limit Ad Tracking
fields.description: Whether Limit Ad Tracking is enabled. When set to true, the conversion will be used for reporting but not targeting. This will prevent remarketing.

limitAdTracking.title: Limit Ad Tracking
limitAdTracking.description: Whether Limit Ad Tracking is enabled. When set to true, the conversion will be used for reporting but not targeting. This will prevent remarketing.

fields.label: Child Directed Treatment
fields.description: Whether this particular request may come from a user under the age of 13, under COPPA compliance.

childDirectedTreatment.title: Child Directed Treatment
childDirectedTreatment.description: Whether this particular request may come from a user under the age of 13, under COPPA compliance.

fields.label: Non-Personalized Ad
fields.description: Whether the conversion was for a non personalized ad.

nonPersonalizedAd.title: Non-Personalized Ad
nonPersonalizedAd.description: Whether the conversion was for a non personalized ad.

fields.label: Treatment For Underage
fields.description: Whether this particular request may come from a user under the age of 16 (may differ by country), under compliance with the European Union's General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

treatmentForUnderage.title: Treatment For Underage
treatmentForUnderage.description: Whether this particular request may come from a user under the age of 16 (may differ by country), under compliance with the European Union's General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

fields.label: Ad User Data Consent
fields.description: The user data consent status for the conversion.

adUserDataConsent.title: Ad User Data Consent
adUserDataConsent.description: The user data consent status for the conversion.

fields.label: Cart Data Merchant ID
fields.description: The Merchant Center ID where the items are uploaded. Required if the cart data is provided.

merchantId.title: Cart Data Merchant ID
merchantId.description: The Merchant Center ID where the items are uploaded. Required if the cart data is provided.

fields.label: Cart Data Merchant Feed Label
fields.description: The feed labels associated with the feed where your items are uploaded. Required if the cart data is provided. For more information, please refer to https://support.google.com/merchants/answer/12453549.

merchantFeedLabel.title: Cart Data Merchant Feed Label
merchantFeedLabel.description: The feed labels associated with the feed where your items are uploaded. Required if the cart data is provided. For more information, please refer to https://support.google.com/merchants/answer/12453549.

fields.label: Cart Data Merchant Feed Language
fields.description: The language associated with the feed where your items are uploaded. Use ISO 639-1 language codes. This field is needed only when item IDs are not unique across multiple Merchant Center feeds.

merchantFeedLanguage.title: Cart Data Merchant Feed Language
merchantFeedLanguage.description: The language associated with the feed where your items are uploaded. Use ISO 639-1 language codes. This field is needed only when item IDs are not unique across multiple Merchant Center feeds.

fields.label: Cart Data Items
fields.description: The items in the cart.

itemId.title: Item ID
itemId.description: The item ID associated with the conversion.

fields.label: Batch Size
fields.description: Max number of events to upload in each batch request.

batch_size.title: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Max number of events to upload in each batch request.

fields.label: Enable Batching?
fields.description: When enabled, Segment will send events in batches.

actions.name: Conversion Upload
actions.description: Send a conversion to Campaign Manager 360.

fields.label: Custom Variables
fields.description: Custom variables associated with the conversion.

customVariables.title: Custom Variables
customVariables.description: Custom variables associated with the conversion.

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of the custom variable.

value.title: Value
value.description: The value of the custom variable.

fields.label: Required ID
fields.description: A user identifier record the conversion against. Exactly one of Google Click ID, Display Click ID, Encrypted User ID, Mobile Device ID, Match ID, Impression ID or Encrypted User ID Candidates must be provided.

dclid.title: Display Click ID

mobileDeviceId.title: Mobile Device ID
mobileDeviceId.description: The mobile device ID associated with the conversion.

matchId.title: Match ID
matchId.description: The match ID field. A match ID is your own first-party identifier that has been synced with Google using the match ID feature in Floodlight.

impressionId.title: Impression ID
impressionId.description: The impression ID associated with the conversion.

encryptedUserIdCandidates.title: Encrypted User ID Candidates
encryptedUserIdCandidates.description: A comma separated list of the alphanumeric encrypted user IDs. Any user ID with exposure prior to the conversion timestamp will be used in the inserted conversion. If no such user ID is found then the conversion will be rejected with INVALID_ARGUMENT error. When set, `encryptionInfo` should also be specified.
